originalTitle: Chatting reinforcement learning. Editing videos is boring. Come say hi!
title: Debugging GPU Drive Crashes and Achieving Sub-30 Second Training in PufferLib
summary: Debugged GPU Drive crashes when running multiple environment copies by implementing a subprocess fix. Fixed rendering and masking bugs for variable agent counts, enabling hyperparameter sweeps that solved the environment in under 30 seconds on a 4090 GPU.
